scripts.check:syntax: find src functions -name '*.js' -type f -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-script-order.mjs && node scripts/verify-i18n-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-evolution-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-leaderboard-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-gameplay-outcomes.mjs && node scripts/test-audio-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-api-boundary.mjs

name: neon-survivor_jh
description: **NEON SURVIVOR** is a browser survival action game where you outlast endless waves of neon monsters. Move, dodge, collect gems, and choose upgrade cards to shape your build while weapons attack automatically.
